description_long: This is a modern computer workstation setup featuring a large rectangular desk with a dark gray surface and matching side table. The desk supports a widescreen monitor, two orange-accented speakers, a keyboard, mouse, and various office supplies, while a black and white ergonomic office chair is positioned in front. A desktop computer tower sits on the adjacent side table, with visible cabling connecting the components. Above the desk, a wall-mounted bar holds a white hanging pot, likely for a plant or storage. The desk appears sturdy, with a solid panel front and open sides for legroom and cable management. The overall setup is organized for productivity, with ample workspace and integrated technology.
description: A modern, dark gray computer workstation desk with an ergonomic chair, desktop computer, speakers, and a wall-mounted hanging pot. The setup is organized for productivity and tech use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main desk surface with monitor, keyboard, mouse, speakers, and the ergonomic chair positioned for use.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the monitor, speakers, and the wall-mounted hanging pot above the desk, with the computer tower on the side table.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the back of the monitor, visible cabling, and the open structure beneath the desk for legroom and cable management.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back of the chair, the computer tower, and the arrangement of speakers and monitor on the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the chair and main workspace, featuring the monitor, keyboard, and mouse; the back is more closed with the computer tower and cabling.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation for office or home productivity
